content: Furthermore, these are “guides” but I’m not sure if they are reliable since I haven’t watched them.

!tag guide

- [Stats and Realm Mechanics](<https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pnheXD_pkjz8YGmWWlQPnw4eXr6NRm-W6267c0K1_QU/edit?slide=id.p1#slide=id.p1>), by Mythag University
- [Beginner's Guide](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cC7FOebdy_J2hONmVT1QUSk6SxIRTuVoI4XADVlq5JU/edit?gid=441466965#gid=441466965>), by Flares
- [How to Aliemus 101 & 102](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1387172781829128304>), by Jynn
- [Damage Formula](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652>), by Jynn
- [Morimens Glossary](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417237861412896859>), by Mythag University
- [Morimens Timeline Megasheet](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BCfu0RdP6A4SIE0XmoevGFTKp5qbilfiTViGwprpHv4/edit?usp=sharing>), by nikolazuli
The best way to approach this is to watch the info in those guides and after that, ask/specify here to get a second opinion. After some time, one will be able to do stuff by himself.

Lemme add more info since I kinda feel like it

Nautila: Big Shielder

Ogier: Shielder/Strength Generator/2 turn Vulnerable

Winkle: Weakness/Exalt Generator for Others/Keyflare Gen

Ramona: Keyflare Gen/Pick Card in Deck put in Hand set to 0(Helps with drawing Tawil “Pinions”)

Erica: Keyflare Gen/On-Demand Weakness and Vuln on Exalt/Increase Crit Rate and Dmg this turn after Exalt
Your current team has a source of applying Weakness, but lack a source of Vulnerable on enemies. Another thing to take note of.
